steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Standing, he directs his gaze to the spot where his forehead will touch during prostration, raises his hands to the level of his ears or shoulders and says:

steps.title: A prayer for protection from the devil
steps.description: He places his hands on his chest, laying his right hand over his left, and says:

text.translation: I seek Allah's protection from the cursed devil

steps.title: Reading Surah Al-Fatiha
steps.description: Standing, he directs his gaze to the spot where his forehead will touch during prostration, raises his hands to the level of his ears or shoulders and says:

steps.title: Ameen
steps.description: After this, he says:

steps.title: Reading additional Surahs
steps.description: Reciting additional Surahs is not an obligatory act. Any of the Surahs listed below can be recited after "Al-Fatiha" in the first and second Rak'ahs of the prayer.

steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Standing, he directs his gaze to the place where his forehead will touch during prostration, raises his hands to the level of his ears or shoulders and says:

steps.title: Waist bow (hand)
steps.description: You should now be in the bowing (rukoo') position. Say this 3 times:

text.translation: Glory be to my Lord the Supreme

steps.title: Straightening
steps.description: Next, come up from the bowing position into the standing position. As you are coming up say:

text.translation: Allah listens to the one who praises him

steps.title: Standing
steps.description: Now you should be in the standing position with your hands by your sides. In this position say:

text.translation: Our Lord, and to You belongs the praise

steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Next you go into the prostration (sujood) position. As you go into this position say:

steps.title: Prostration (sajda)
steps.description: In the sujood position say the following 3 times:

text.translation: Glory be to my Lord Most High

steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Next you come up into the sitting position, saying:

steps.title: Straightening
steps.description: In this position, sit on the left thigh, with the left foot along the ground and the right foot upright. In the sitting position say the following (3 times):

steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Next you come up into the standing position, saying:

steps.title: Dua in prostration
steps.description: In the sujood position say the following 3 times:

text.translation: Glory be to my Lord Most High

steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Next you come up into the standing position, saying:

steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Go into prostration again, saying:

steps.title: Takbir
steps.description: Next you come up into the standing position, saying:

steps.title: Reading at-tahiyat
steps.description: Then go into the sitting position. At this point raise your index finger on your right hand. Now recite the following:

steps.title: The end of prayer
steps.description: Then you should say:

steps.title: Turn your head to the right
steps.description: Upon completion of the Tashahhud and the words that follow, the prayer is finished with the Tasleem. Turn your head to the right and say:

text.translation: May Allah's peace and mercy be upon you

steps.title: Turn your head to the left
steps.description: Turn your head to the left and say:

text.translation: May Allah's peace and mercy be upon you
